description: Turn anonymous website traffic into pipeline. JS snippet captures visitors, IP resolved to company via People Data Labs, best-fit contact found via Apollo enrichment, optional person-level ID via RB2B. Auto-creates leads, Slack notifications, AI-drafted outreach, campaign auto-enrollment.

userStories.title: Create website_visitors + visitor_snippet_configs tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I want dedicated tables for storing resolved website visitors and per-org snippet configurations so that visitor data has its own lifecycle separate from campaign tracking
acceptanceCriteria: website_visitors table with: id, org_id, visitor_ip, user_agent, session_id, referrer, page_url, page_title, visited_at, resolved_company_name, resolved_company_domain, resolved_company_data (JSONB), resolution_provider, resolution_status, matched_contact_id (FK nullable), rb2b_person_data (JSONB nullable), rb2b_identified (BOOLEAN), lead_id (FK nullable), enrichment_status, created_at, updated_at

visitor_snippet_configs table with: id, org_id (unique), snippet_token (unique auto-generated), is_active, allowed_domains (TEXT[]), exclude_paths (TEXT[]), auto_enrich, auto_create_lead, rb2b_api_key (nullable), rb2b_enabled, created_at, updated_at
RLS policies: org members read/write own org data; service role full access
Indexes on org_id, visitor_ip, session_id, resolution_status, visited_at, snippet_token
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS before CREATE POLICY
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Schema foundation. Both tables in one migration.

userStories.title: Build visitor tracking JS snippet + serving edge function
userStories.description: As a 60 customer, I want a lightweight JavaScript snippet I can paste into my website so that visitor sessions are tracked and sent to 60 for identification
acceptanceCriteria: Edge function visitor-snippet-serve/index.ts serves minified JS based on snippet_token query param
Snippet < 5KB minified, loads async, non-blocking
Captures: page_url, page_title, referrer, session_id (localStorage, 30 min TTL)
POSTs to visitor-track/index.ts edge function
Server-side IP extraction from x-forwarded-for / x-real-ip / cf-connecting-ip headers
Validates snippet_token and checks allowed_domains before accepting
Respects exclude_paths config
Rate limiting: max 100 events per IP per hour
Uses getCorsHeaders(req) from _shared/corsHelper.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Two edge functions: serve snippet + track visitor event.

userStories.title: Build IP-to-Company resolution service
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a provider-agnostic IP resolution service so that visitor IPs are resolved to company names using People Data Labs with ability to swap providers later
acceptanceCriteria: New shared utility _shared/ipResolution.ts with interface: resolveIPToCompany(ip, provider) -> CompanyResolution
People Data Labs adapter: calls PDL IP Enrichment API, returns company name, domain, industry, size, location
Provider-agnostic: dispatches to correct adapter based on provider param
Handles residential IPs (mark resolution_status: 'residential', skip enrichment)
Handles VPN/datacenter IPs (mark resolution_status: 'unresolvable')
Caches company resolution by IP for 24 hours (avoid duplicate API calls)
Deducts from org credit balance via existing costTracking.ts pattern
Stores full API response in resolved_company_data JSONB
Uses maybeSingle() for config lookups
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Provider-agnostic design. PDL first, Snitcher later.

userStories.title: Build contact matching pipeline (company to best-fit contact)
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want 60 to automatically find the most relevant person at the identified company so that I have someone to reach out to immediately
acceptanceCriteria: New edge function visitor-enrich-contact/index.ts triggered after successful IP resolution
Queries Apollo People Search: filter by resolved_company_domain + org ICP criteria (title keywords, seniority)
Falls back to generic seniority filter (VP, Director, C-level) if no ICP criteria configured
Returns top match with name, title, email, phone, LinkedIn URL
Creates or matches contact in contacts table using companyMatching.ts pattern
Updates website_visitors.matched_contact_id with resolved contact
Deduplicates: if contact exists in 60, links to existing record
Updates website_visitors.enrichment_status to 'enriched' or 'skipped'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Integrate RB2B webhook for person-level identification
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want person-level visitor identification via RB2B so that I know exactly who visited my site, not just the company
acceptanceCriteria: New edge function rb2b-webhook/index.ts receives RB2B webhook POST payloads
Parses RB2B fields: LinkedIn URL, name, title, company, business email, industry, employee count, captured URL, referrer
Matches to existing website_visitors record by IP + session window (5 min) or creates new record
Stores full payload in rb2b_person_data JSONB, sets rb2b_identified = true
Creates/matches contact with RB2B data (higher confidence than Apollo ICP guess)
RB2B data takes precedence over Apollo match when both exist
Webhook URL per org: project-ref/functions/v1/rb2b-webhook?token={snippet_token}
Validates snippet_token before processing
Idempotent: same event processed twice does not create duplicates
Uses getCorsHeaders(req) and handles CORS preflight
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: RB2B webhook follows existing webhook-leads pattern.

userStories.title: Auto-create leads from identified visitors
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want identified website visitors to automatically become leads so that high-intent visitors enter my pipeline without manual effort
acceptanceCriteria: After contact matching or RB2B identification, create lead if auto_create_lead enabled
Lead fields: external_source 'website_visitor', enrichment_status 'enriched', contact_id linked
Deduplication: existing lead for contact+org gets last_interaction_at update, not duplicate
Page visit context in lead metadata: pages_visited array, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, total_visits
Triggers enrichment cascade if contact data incomplete
Updates website_visitors.lead_id with created/matched lead
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-004 or US-005 completing first.

userStories.title: Slack notification for identified visitors
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want a Slack DM when a high-intent visitor is identified so that I can act quickly while interest is warm
acceptanceCriteria: After lead creation, send Slack DM to deal/contact owner or org default user
Message includes: company name, contact name + title, pages visited, timestamp, confidence (RB2B confirmed vs Apollo ICP match)
Block Kit with action buttons: View Contact, Draft Outreach, Add to Campaign, Dismiss
Draft Outreach button triggers visitor-outreach-drafter skill
Throttling: max 10 notifications per org per hour, batch remaining into digest
Only fires if Slack integration connected
Uses existing slack-send-message pattern
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Reuses existing Slack Block Kit patterns from deal alerts.

userStories.title: Visitor Intelligence settings page + snippet install UI
userStories.description: As a 60 customer, I want a settings page where I can enable visitor tracking, copy the snippet, configure domains, and connect RB2B
acceptanceCriteria: New settings section under Settings > Integrations: Website Visitor Intelligence
Snippet code block with copy button (pre-filled with org snippet_token)
Domain allowlist input (add/remove allowed domains)
Exclude paths input (URL patterns to skip)
Toggles: Auto-create leads, Auto-enrich contacts
RB2B section: API key input, enable toggle, webhook URL display
Status indicator: Active (green) / No visitors yet (gray) / Not installed (yellow)
Last 24h visitor count
Follows ConfigureModal + ConfigSection + ConfigToggle pattern
useVisitorIntelligenceIntegration hook following useInstantlyIntegration pattern
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Settings UI follows established integration pattern.

userStories.title: Auto-inject snippet into 60-built landing pages
userStories.description: As a 60 customer building landing pages with 60's builder, I want visitor tracking to work automatically without manually adding the snippet
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page publish flow (landingPublishService.ts) auto-injects visitor snippet before </body>
Only injects if org has visitor intelligence enabled (is_active = true)
Snippet token pulled from org config, not hardcoded
Published page domain auto-added to allowed_domains if not present
Does not double-inject if user manually added snippet
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Website Visitors Ops table template
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want to see identified website visitors in an Ops table so I can sort, filter, and act on them alongside my other leads
acceptanceCriteria: New 'Website Visitors' template in Ops table creation with pre-configured columns
Columns: Company, Contact, Title, Pages Visited, Visit Date, Source (PDL/RB2B), Lead Status
Auto-populate from website_visitors where resolved + enriched
Supports existing Ops table actions: push to Instantly, enrich, export
Filter by: date range, company size, resolution source, page visited
Refreshes automatically as new visitors identified
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Copilot skill — visitor-outreach-drafter
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want the AI copilot to draft personalized outreach referencing the prospect's website visit so my outreach feels relevant and timely
acceptanceCriteria: New copilot skill visitor-outreach-drafter in skills/atomic/
Context includes: company name, contact name+title, pages visited with titles, visit recency, existing deal/contact history
Generates personalized email referencing specific content viewed
Tone matches org email style (uses learning_preferences if available)
Callable from: Slack button (US-007), copilot chat, Ops table action
Stores draft in crm_approval_queue for rep approval before sending
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: New skill following existing SKILL.md format.

userStories.title: Workflow automation — auto-add to campaign on ICP match
userStories.description: As a sales rep, I want visitors matching my ICP to be automatically added to an outreach campaign so high-intent leads are engaged without manual intervention
acceptanceCriteria: New automation rule type: When visitor matches ICP -> add to campaign
ICP criteria configurable: company size range, industry list, title keywords, seniority
Campaign target: Instantly campaign (existing integration)
HITL gate: first 10 auto-enrollments require rep approval, then autonomous based on acceptance rate
Logs execution in usage_events for cost tracking
Rate limit: max 50 auto-enrollments per org per day
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Uses existing ops-automation-builder pattern with HITL gate.
